mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT a.code FROM permission a, role_permission b, user_role c WHERE a.id = b.permission_id AND b.role_id = c.role_id AND c.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT DISTINCT r.code FROM role r, user_role ur WHERE r.id = ur.role_id AND ur.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT DISTINCT code FROM permission WHERE code IS NOT NULL AND code != ''
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO permission (name, url, method, code, type, parent_id) VALUES (#{name}, #{url}, #{method}, #{code}, #{type}, #{parentId})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM permission ORDER BY id DESC
